ideation: This animation sequence represents the passage of time and the precision of a clock, using both arms to mimic the movement of hands on a clock face. The left arm will represent the hour hand and the right arm the minute hand. The sequence will start with both arms pointing straight down to represent the beginning of the time period. The left arm will then move to approximately the 3 o'clock position, while the right arm will move to the 9 o'clock position. This sequence will then continue with both arms coming back to the starting position.

frames.beat: both arms point down, time begins its slow march
left arm sweeps to three, right arm to nine
both arms return to rest, time has passed
